name: Omega-3 EPA-Dominant
summary: EPA-dominant omega-3 formulations have moderate evidence for depressive symptom reduction in some analyses.
description: EPA-dominant omega-3s are used as evidence-aligned lipid modulators that can shift eicosanoids toward less inflammatory signaling.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: known allergy to fish or shellfish
anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications such as warfarin or aspirin due to bleeding risk though clinical evidence is mixed
discontinue before scheduled surgery due to theoretical bleeding risk
high doses above 2-4 grams daily associated with increased atrial fibrillation risk
cardiovascular disease warrants clinician guidance on dosing
